results.title: نتيجة محاكاة
results.content:
**1. OpenAI Announces GPT‑4 Turbo Release**  
URL: https://www.technews.com/openai-gpt4-turbo  
Description:  
OpenAI has unveiled GPT‑4 Turbo, a faster and cheaper variant of its flagship model. Early adopters report a 30 % reduction in inference time with comparable performance to GPT‑4.  

**2. DeepMind Unveils AlphaFold 3.0 for Protein Folding**  
URL: https://www.scienceworld.com/deepmind-alphafold3  
Description:
